title: Sabastian Sawe Makes History: Sub-2 Hour Marathon Achieved
seoTitle: Sabastian Sawe Makes History: Sub-2 Hour Marathon Achieved
seoDescription: The athletic world is in awe today as Kenya’s **Sabastian Sawe** did what was once thought biologically impossible: completing an officially sanctioned mar...

blocks.content: The athletic world is in awe today as Kenya’s **Sabastian Sawe** did what was once thought biologically impossible: completing an officially sanctioned marathon in under two hours. Clocking in at an astounding 1:59:48, Sawe has firmly cemented his legacy in the pantheon of running legends. ### Pushing Human Limits Benefiting from revolutionary shoe technology and a perfect pacing strategy, Sawe maintained a blistering average pace. The event, held under optimal weather conditions, marks a paradigm shift in long-distance running.

blocks.caption: A historic day for marathon running.

markdown: The athletic world is in awe today as Kenya’s **Sabastian Sawe** did what was once thought biologically impossible: completing an officially sanctioned marathon in under two hours. Clocking in at an astounding 1:59:48, Sawe has firmly cemented his legacy in the pantheon of running legends. ### Pushing Human Limits Benefiting from revolutionary shoe technology and a perfect pacing strategy, Sawe maintained a blistering average pace. The event, held under optimal weather conditions, marks a paradigm shift in long-distance running.
